title: Finance Module — operator settings
description: Operator-configurable settings for the Finance Module. Per docs/system/MODULE_MANIFEST.md §6.7 (views.settings.schema_ref) and docs/genus/modules/finance/SPEC_v1.md §9. Connector ownership: Moneybird MCP is wired in Settings → Wiring by the Genus Agent (SPEC_v1 §10); this schema references the connector by id rather than carrying credentials.

moneybird.description: Moneybird MCP connection. Credentials are owned by the Genus Agent via Settings → Wiring; this module only references the wired connector. The full read-side contract — required MCP tools, entity mapping, healthcheck cadence, staleness windows, and the v1→GEN-104 migration delta — lives in modules/finance/connectors/moneybird.md.

connector_ref.description: Stable id of the Moneybird MCP connector. v1 interim: free-form string (e.g. 'connectors/moneybird/medivara'); the operator picks the installation-name segment. GEN-104 target: resolves against the central Wiring registry — same on-disk format, validated at bind time.

endpoint_override.description: MCP endpoint URL. v1 interim: required for bootstrap (no Wiring UI yet). GEN-104 target: optional override of the value the Wiring row provides — the row wins when both exist.

auth_token_ref.description: Reference into the operator's secret store (e.g. 'secrets/moneybird/medivara'). The module NEVER sees the token itself — the Genus Agent injects it into the MCP server's env at start. v1 interim: required for bootstrap. GEN-104 target: optional override of the Wiring-row value.

healthcheck_route.description: Path on the MCP endpoint used by the Genus Agent's 15-minute probe loop (see connectors/moneybird.md §4.1). v1 interim: module-local default. GEN-104 target: per-connector-type default in the Wiring registry; module-local value remains as override.

interim_wiring.description: v1-only marker indicating the fields above are populated directly here rather than resolved from the central Settings → Wiring registry. Set to false once GEN-104 ships and the operator has migrated this installation; the loader then ignores endpoint_override / auth_token_ref and resolves both from the Wiring row keyed by connector_ref. The migration is mechanical — no schema change — per connectors/moneybird.md §7.

alerts.description: Threshold-driven alert configuration. Drives the FIN-RUNWAY-ALERT + FIN-DRAW-CONFLICT-ALERT recipes.

runway_days_warning.description: Warn (yellow) when runway drops below this many days.

runway_days_critical.description: Critical (red) when runway drops below this many days.

burn_variance_warning_pct.description: Warn when monthly burn deviates from plan by this percentage.

draw_vs_runway_conflict_days.description: Trigger draw-vs-runway conflict alert when a proposed founder draw would shorten runway by at least this many days.

day_of_month.description: Day of the month the digest fires.

recommendations.description: Per-category enable/disable within the v1 allowed action set.
